title: FIFA emerges as the $9 billion winner as the biggest, brashest World Cup ever draws to a close
summary_full: The football governing body presided over the most lucrative sporting event in history and is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026.
summary_public: The football governing body presided over the most lucrative sporting event in history and is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026.
